name: HENRY SCHEIN INC
summary: PART I General Henry Schein, Inc. is a solutions company for health care professionals powered by a network of people and technology. We believe we are the worlds largest provider of health care products and services primarily to office- based dental and medical practitioners, as well as alternate sites of care.
